question: Can I integrate MakTek with other tools?
How do I contact support for urgent issues?
What if the answer is not in the knowledge base?
answer:
Yes, you can integrate MakTek with other tools. MakTek offers integrations with over 100 popular tools, including:
* Salesforce
* Slack
* Microsoft Teams
* Google Workspace
* Jira
* Zapier

Additionally, if you have a Pro or Enterprise plan, you can use API access to integrate with other tools. You can also develop custom integrations using the webhook system. For more information, you can refer to the REST API documentation, which includes SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Java.

I'm so sorry to hear you're experiencing an urgent issue. I'm here to help you get in touch with our support team as quickly as possible.

For urgent technical issues, you can reach out to us through our 24/7 emergency hotline at **1-800-MAKTEK-911**. This hotline is available outside of our regular business hours, which are Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST.

If your issue isn't extremely urgent, you can also contact us during business hours through:
* Live chat on our website
* Phone at 1-800-MAKTEK-01
* Email at support@maktek.com (we'll get back to you within 24 hours)

Please know that we're here to help, and we'll do our best to resolve your issue as quickly as possible.
I'm sorry, I'm having trouble finding a definitive answer for you. Would you like me to create a support ticket so a human representative can look into this for you?
contexts:
Q: Can I integrate MakTek with other tools?
A: MakTek offers integrations with over 100 popular tools including Salesforce, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, Jira, and Zapier. API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Our REST API documentation includes SDKs for Python, JavaScript, and Java. Custom integrations can be developed using our webhook system.

Q: How do I contact MakTek technical support?
A: You can reach MakTek technical support through: 1) Live chat on our website (available 9 AM - 6 PM EST), 2) Email at support@maktek.com (response within 24 hours), 3) Phone at 1-800-MAKTEK-01 (same hours as live chat), 4) Submit a ticket through your account dashboard. Enterprise customers have access to dedicated support channels.

Q: What are the system requirements for MakTek software?
A: Minimum requirements: Windows 10/11 or macOS 11+, 8GB RAM, 2GB available storage, Intel Core i5 or equivalent processor, and stable internet connection. Recommended: 16GB RAM, SSD storage, and dedicated graphics card for optimal performance. Mobile apps require iOS 14+ or Android 10+.

Q: How secure is my data with MakTek?
A: MakTek employs enterprise-grade security measures including: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.3 for data in transit, regular security audits, SOC 2 Type II compliance, GDPR compliance, and automatic daily backups. We never sell customer data to third parties. Two-factor authentication is available and recommended for all accounts.

Q: How do I export my data from MakTek?
A: To export your data: 1) Navigate to 'Account Settings' → 'Data Management', 2) Click 'Export Data', 3) Select data types to include (files, metadata, user data, etc.), 4) Choose format (CSV, JSON, or ZIP), 5) Click 'Request Export'. Large exports may take several hours. You'll receive an email when your download is ready (link valid for 7 days).

Q: How do I contact MakTek technical support?
A: You can reach MakTek technical support through: 1) Live chat on our website (available 9 AM - 6 PM EST), 2) Email at support@maktek.com (response within 24 hours), 3) Phone at 1-800-MAKTEK-01 (same hours as live chat), 4) Submit a ticket through your account dashboard. Enterprise customers have access to dedicated support channels.

Q: What are MakTek's business hours?
A: MakTek customer support is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. For urgent technical issues, our 24/7 emergency hotline is available at 1-800-MAKTEK-911.

Q: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
A: To report bugs or request features: 1) Log into your MakTek account, 2) Navigate to 'Support' → 'Feedback', 3) Select 'Bug Report' or 'Feature Request', 4) Provide detailed description and screenshots if applicable. You can also visit our public roadmap at roadmap.maktek.com to vote on upcoming features.

Q: What is the protocol for a damaged package or shipment?
A: If you receive a damaged package: 1) Take clear photos of the damage (box and item), 2) Keep all original packaging materials, 3) Contact MakTek support at support@maktek.com or via live chat within 48 hours of delivery, 4) Provide your order number and photos of the damage. We will investigate the shipping claim and arrange for a replacement or full refund immediately. Do not return the item until instructed by our team.

Q: How do I reset my MakTek account password?
A: To reset your password: 1) Go to the MakTek login page, 2) Click 'Forgot Password', 3) Enter your registered email address, 4) Check your email for a reset link (valid for 24 hours), 5) Create a new password with at least 8 characters including one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.
ground_truth: Yes. MakTek supports integrations with many common business tools and platforms.
Urgent issues should be escalated through support with high priority and a clear issue summary.
The assistant should clearly state uncertainty and offer to create or escalate a support ticket.
